title: Chicago Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Chicago, with a Z-Score of -3.23. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Chicago are extreme, with a high degree day (HDD) value of 12.3 GG and no cooling degree days (CDD) recorded. 
 The relative humidity is at 85% and the wind speed is moderate at 7.8 km/h. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with significant impacts on various sectors.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
